name: ssh-authentication
description: Parses SSH authentication logs (success and failure)

test_samples.description: Failed password is a login failure with source IP and user
test_samples.input: Jan 15 12:00:00 webserver sshd[12345]: Failed password for root from 203.0.113.5 port 54321 ssh2

test_samples.description: Accepted password is a successful login
test_samples.input: Jan 15 12:01:00 webserver sshd[12346]: Accepted password for alice from 198.51.100.9 port 51000 ssh2

test_samples.description: Accepted publickey is also a successful login
test_samples.input: Jan 15 12:02:00 webserver sshd[12347]: Accepted publickey for deploy from 198.51.100.10 port 51002 ssh2: RSA SHA256:n0tar3alkeyhash
